Metadata.title: Taste / League
Metadata.description: Minimalist League of Legends Account Manager

About.title: About Taste League
About.p1: Taste League Dashboard is a minimalist, elegant, and highly secure multi-account management tool tailored for League of Legends players.
About.p2: We believe that managing multiple smurf accounts should not be a cluttered or unsafe experience. This project strictly adheres to the philosophy of extreme restraint and premium aesthetics, focusing purely on the core experience.
About.p3: Taste League Dashboard is an open-source project. You can find the source code, report issues, or contribute on GitHub.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.p1: Your data privacy and security are our top priorities. All account passwords and sensitive data are double-encrypted using Node.js native crypto AES-256-GCM algorithms.
Privacy.p2: This dashboard does not transmit your League of Legends credentials to any third-party servers. All data remains encrypted and strictly localized to your own deployment environment.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.intro: By accessing and using Taste League Dashboard, you agree to the following terms:
Terms.p1: This dashboard is designed strictly for personal use to help players manage their own accounts.
Terms.p2: This project is distributed under the MIT License. The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. The authors are not responsible for any issues arising from the use of this software.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.desc: Have questions, suggestions, or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you. The best way to reach out is through our GitHub repository.
